Dialog.name: MSG_801_1_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 0 5}You're up against a difficult opponent. But if the intel is available, I can help you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_801_1_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 0 5}I can suggest the most effective attack, based on the enemy's weakness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_801_1_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 5}But, I can only assist like this when we know the enemy's weakness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_801_1_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 0 5}I'm sorry, but until you can get more information, you'll be on your own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_801_2_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 5 0 6}The enemy here looks tough. But if we have any intel on them, I can help you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_801_2_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 6 0 6}I can tell you what attack will work best based on the enemy's weakness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_801_2_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 7 0 6}But, I can only assist you like that when we already know what an enemy's weak to...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_801_2_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 8 0 6}You'll need to analyze them first before I can help.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_801_1_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Press the R1 button during battle to use the Assist function.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_801_1_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If there is a skill available that can strike the enemy's weakness, then the cursor will automatically highlight it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_801_1_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This will help speed up menu navigation during battle, so give it a try.[n]{f 1 1}
